<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">

    <!-- ==================== 存储权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="32" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        tools:ignore="ScopedStorage" />

    <!-- ==================== 网络权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE" />

    <!-- ==================== 相机/麦克风权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO" />

    <!-- ==================== 位置权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION" />

    <!-- ==================== 电话权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CALL_PHONE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALLS" />

    <!-- ==================== 短信权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SEND_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_MMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_WAP_PUSH" />

    <!-- ==================== 联系人权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CONTACTS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_CONTACTS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.GET_ACCOUNTS" />

    <!-- ==================== 日历权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALENDAR" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR" />

    <!-- ==================== 传感器权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BODY_SENSORS" />

    <!-- ==================== 系统权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.VIBRATE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WAKE_LOCK" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FLASHLIGHT" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BLUETOOTH" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADMIN" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.NFC" />

    <!-- ==================== Android 13+ 通知权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />

    <!-- ==================== Android 13+ 媒体权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />

    <!-- ==================== 快捷方式权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="com.android.launcher.permission.INSTALL_SHORTCUT" />
    <uses-permission android:name="com.android.launcher.permission.UNINSTALL_SHORTCUT" />

    <!-- ==================== 小部件权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BIND_APPWIDGET" />

    <!-- ==================== 开机启动权限 ==================== -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" />

    <!-- ==================== 查询其他应用（Android 11+） ==================== -->
    <queries>
        <package android:name="moe.shizuku.privileged.api" />
        <package android:name="com.rosan.dhizuku" />
        <package android:name="${applicationId}" />
    </queries>

    <application
        android:name=".UinApplication"
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules"
        android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules"
        android:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground"
        android:roundIcon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true"
        android:requestLegacyExternalStorage="true"
        android:largeHeap="true"
        tools:ignore="GoogleAppIndexingWarning"
        tools:targetApi="33">

        <!-- ==================== 主 Activity ==================== -->
        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool"
            android:launchMode="singleTask"
            android:excludeFromRecents="false"
            android:taskAffinity=""
            android:alwaysRetainTaskState="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

        <!-- ==================== 插件相关 Activity ==================== -->
        <activity
            android:name=".plugin.PluginHostActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.plugin.PluginManageActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.dev.NativePluginWizardActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.dev.WebPluginWizardActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.dev.DevDocActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.docs.DocViewerActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.help.HelpActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />

        <!-- ==================== 设置相关 Activity ==================== -->
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.permission.PermissionManagerActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.permission.PluginPermissionManagerActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.log.LogViewerActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.backup.BackupManagerActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.settings.UIConfigActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />

        <!-- ==================== 小部件相关组件 ==================== -->
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.widget.UINWidgetConfigureActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool" />
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.widget.Widget1x1ConfigureActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool"
            android:label="@string/widget_1x1_config_title">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_CONFIGURE" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
        <activity
            android:name=".widget.WidgetClickActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@android:style/Theme.Translucent.NoTitleBar"
            android:excludeFromRecents="true"
            android:noHistory="true" />
        <receiver
            android:name=".widget.UINWidgetProvider"
            android:exported="true"
            android:label="@string/widget_name">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE" />
                <action android:name="com.UIN.Tool.REFRESH_WIDGET" />
            </intent-filter>
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.appwidget.provider"
                android:resource="@xml/uin_widget_info" />
        </receiver>
        <service
            android:name=".widget.UINWidgetService"
            android:exported="false"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_REMOTEVIEWS" />
        <!-- ==================== 1x1 桌面小部件 ==================== -->
        <receiver
            android:name=".widget.Widget1x1Provider"
            android:exported="true"
            android:label="@string/widget_1x1_name">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE" />
                <action android:name="com.UIN.Tool.REFRESH_WIDGET_1x1" />
            </intent-filter>
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.appwidget.provider"
                android:resource="@xml/widget_1x1_info" />
        </receiver>

        <receiver
            android:name=".widget.SystemEventReceiver"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>

        <!-- ==================== 代码编辑器 Activity ==================== -->
        <activity
            android:name=".ui.dev.CodeEditorActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.UIN.Tool"
            android:configChanges="orientation|screenSize|keyboardHidden" />

        <!-- ==================== 其他组件 ==================== -->
        <service
            android:name=".service.UinAccessibilityService"
            android:exported="true"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.accessibilityservice.AccessibilityService" />
            </intent-filter>
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.accessibilityservice"
                android:resource="@xml/accessibility_service_config" />
        </service>
        <provider
            android:name="androidx.core.content.FileProvider"
            android:authorities="${applicationId}.fileprovider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:grantUriPermissions="true">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.support.FILE_PROVIDER_PATHS"
                android:resource="@xml/file_paths" />
        </provider>

    </application>

</manifest>

            <corners android:topLeftRadius="24dp" android:topRightRadius="24dp" />

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background">

    <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar
        android:id="@+id/toolbar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_toolbar"
        app:titleTextColor="@android:color/white"
        app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back"
        app:navigationIconTint="@android:color/white"
        app:title="@string/title_backup_manager" />

    <!-- 按钮网格布局 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg">

        <LinearLayout style="@style/ButtonGridRow">
            <!-- 备份全部按钮 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/btn_backup_container"
                style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md">
                <ImageView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_backup"
                    android:tint="@color/primary" />
                <TextView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                    android:text="@string/btn_backup" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 恢复按钮 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/btn_restore_container"
                style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md">
                <ImageView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_restore"
                    android:tint="@color/warning" />
                <TextView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                    android:text="@string/btn_restore" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout style="@style/ButtonGridRow">
            <!-- 刷新按钮 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/btn_refresh_container"
                style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md">
                <ImageView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_refresh"
                    android:tint="@color/info" />
                <TextView
                    style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                    android:text="@string/refresh" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 占位（保持网格对齐） -->
            <LinearLayout
                style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md"
                android:visibility="invisible" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progress_bar"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="4dp"
            android:progressDrawable="@drawable/bg_progress"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 刷新状态按钮 -->

                style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background">

    <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar
        android:id="@+id/toolbar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_toolbar"
        app:titleTextColor="@android:color/white"
        app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back"
        app:navigationIconTint="@android:color/white"
        app:title="@string/title_plugin_manage" />

    <ScrollView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <!-- 操作按钮组 - 网格布局 2x3 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_lg">

                <LinearLayout
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md">

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_import_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_import"
                            android:tint="@color/primary"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/btn_import_plugin"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_batch_import_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_copy"
                            android:tint="@color/primary_light"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/btn_batch_import"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                </LinearLayout>

                <LinearLayout
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md">

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_import_zip_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_archive"
                            android:tint="@color/primary_light"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/btn_import_zip"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_select_all_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_select_all"
                            android:tint="@color/text_secondary"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/select_all"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                </LinearLayout>

                <LinearLayout
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal">

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_export_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_export"
                            android:tint="@color/info"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/export_action"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_uninstall_container"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="70dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_button_flat"
                        android:clickable="true"
                        android:focusable="true"
                        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

                        <ImageView
                            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_delete"
                            android:tint="@color/error"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xs" />

                        <TextView
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/btn_uninstall"
                            android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                            android:maxLines="2"
                            android:gravity="center" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                </LinearLayout>

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 进度指示器 -->
            <ProgressBar
                android:id="@+id/import_progress"
                style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="4dp"
                android:progressDrawable="@drawable/bg_progress"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tv_progress_status"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                style="@style/TextCaption"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            <ProgressBar
                android:id="@+id/uninstall_progress"
                style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="4dp"
                android:progressDrawable="@drawable/bg_progress"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

            <View
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="1dp"
                android:background="@color/divider"
                android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/spacing_lg" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="@string/plugin_manage_installed"
                style="@style/TextSubtitle"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_lg" />

        </LinearLayout>

    </ScrollView>

    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/recycler_view"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:clipToPadding="false" />

    <!-- TPK 提示卡片 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/tpk_hint_container"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:background="@color/surface_variant"
        android:layout_margin="@dimen/spacing_lg"
        android:clickable="true"
        android:focusable="true"
        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_info"
            android:tint="@color/info"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="📦 关于 TPK 文件"
                style="@style/TextSubtitle" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="TPK 本质是 ZIP 包，可重命名为 .zip 解压修改内容"
                style="@style/TextCaption"
                android:maxLines="2"
                android:ellipsize="end" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_medium"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_medium"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_chevron_right"
            android:tint="@color/text_hint" />

    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

        app:navigationIconTint="@android:color/white" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"

        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progress_bar"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"

            android:progressDrawable="@drawable/bg_progress"

            android:max="100" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_step_title"

            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/spacing_lg"

        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/step_container"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg" />

    </ScrollView>

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"
        android:gravity="center_vertical">

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btn_prev"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="@string/prev"
            style="@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Outlined"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btn_next"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height"
            android:layout_weight="1"

            android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            android:id="@+id/btn_finish"

            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="@string/finish"
            style="@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.Button"
            android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md"
            android:visibility="gone" />

    </LinearLayout>

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background">

    <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar
        android:id="@+id/toolbar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_toolbar"
        app:titleTextColor="@android:color/white"
        app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back"
        app:navigationIconTint="@android:color/white"
        app:title="@string/title_ui_config" />

    <ScrollView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <!-- 预览卡片 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="@string/ui_config_preview"
                style="@style/TextSubtitle"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/preview_container"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"
                android:background="@color/background"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xl">

                <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView
                    android:id="@+id/preview_card"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/radius_lg"
                    app:cardElevation="2dp">

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_xl">

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/preview_title"
                            android:layout_width="match_parent"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/preview_title"
                            style="@style/TextHeadline"
                            android:textColor="@color/primary"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md" />

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/preview_text"
                            android:layout_width="match_parent"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:text="@string/preview_text"
                            style="@style/TextBody"
                            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_lg" />

                        <Button
                            android:id="@+id/preview_button"
                            android:layout_width="match_parent"
                            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_medium"
                            android:text="@string/preview_button_text"
                            style="@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.Button" />

                    </LinearLayout>

                </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 颜色配置 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="@string/ui_config_color"
                style="@style/TextSubtitle"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/color_container"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xl" />

            <!-- 形状配置 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="@string/ui_config_shape"
                style="@style/TextSubtitle"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/shape_container"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_xl" />

            <!-- 操作按钮 - 扁平网格布局 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/spacing_md">

                <LinearLayout style="@style/ButtonGridRow">
                    <!-- 重置按钮 -->
                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_reset_container"
                        style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md">
                        <ImageView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_refresh"
                            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />
                        <TextView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                            android:text="@string/reset" />
                    </LinearLayout>

                    <!-- 导出按钮 -->
                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_export_container"
                        style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md">
                        <ImageView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_export"
                            android:tint="@color/info" />
                        <TextView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                            android:text="@string/export_action" />
                    </LinearLayout>
                </LinearLayout>

                <LinearLayout style="@style/ButtonGridRow">
                    <!-- 导入按钮 -->
                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_import_container"
                        style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md">
                        <ImageView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_import"
                            android:tint="@color/warning" />
                        <TextView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                            android:text="@string/import_action" />
                    </LinearLayout>

                    <!-- 应用按钮 -->
                    <LinearLayout
                        android:id="@+id/btn_apply_container"
                        style="@style/FlatButtonContainer"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md">
                        <ImageView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonIcon"
                            android:src="@drawable/ic_check"
                            android:tint="@color/success" />
                        <TextView
                            style="@style/FlatButtonText"
                            android:text="@string/apply" />
                    </LinearLayout>
                </LinearLayout>

            </LinearLayout>

        </LinearLayout>

    </ScrollView>

</LinearLayout>

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:padding="@dimen/spacing_sm">

    <!-- 文件管理栏 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:background="@color/surface"
        android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:elevation="1dp">

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="当前文件:"
            android:textSize="@dimen/text_body"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

        <Spinner
            android:id="@+id/spinner_files"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_sm"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_spinner"
            android:padding="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btn_add_file"
            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_add"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:tint="@color/primary"
            android:contentDescription="添加文件" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btn_delete_file"
            android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_large"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_delete"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:tint="@color/error"
            android:contentDescription="删除文件" />

    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- 代码状态栏 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:background="@color/surface"
        android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:elevation="1dp">

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="@string/plugin_code"
            style="@style/TextSubtitle" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_code_status"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="@string/loaded"
            style="@style/TextCaption" />

    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- 代码编辑器 -->
    <FrameLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:background="@color/surface"
        android:elevation="1dp">

        <ScrollView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:scrollbars="vertical">

            <EditText
                android:id="@+id/et_code"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:gravity="top"
                android:inputType="textMultiLine"
                android:fontFamily="monospace"
                android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"
                android:lineSpacingExtra="@dimen/spacing_xxs"
                android:minHeight="400dp" />

        </ScrollView>

        <!-- 行号指示器（可选） -->
        <View
            android:layout_width="1dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_xl"
            android:background="@color/divider" />

    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- 底部提示栏 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:background="@color/surface"
        android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/spacing_md"
        android:elevation="1dp">

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="@string/dev_hint_title"
            style="@style/TextBody"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="@color/primary"
            android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_code_hint"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="@string/loading"
            style="@style/TextCaption"
            android:lineSpacingExtra="@dimen/spacing_xxs" />

    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

            android:inputType="text"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint" />

    </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

    <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"

        style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox"
        app:hintEnabled="true">

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/et_plugin_description"

    </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background">

    <!-- 工具栏 - 只保留一个菜单按钮 -->
    <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar
        android:id="@+id/toolbar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_toolbar"
        app:titleTextColor="@android:color/white"
        app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_menu"
        app:navigationIconTint="@android:color/white"
        app:title="代码编辑器" />

    <!-- 主内容区 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/main_content_container"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:orientation="horizontal">

        <!-- 左侧文件树（可隐藏） -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/sidebar_layout"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="30"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="@color/surface"
            android:elevation="4dp">

            <!-- 文件树标题栏 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="horizontal"
                android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
                android:background="@color/surface_variant"
                android:gravity="center_vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:text="项目文件"
                    style="@style/TextSubtitle"
                    android:textSize="14sp" />

                <ImageButton
                    android:id="@+id/btn_add_file"
                    android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_medium"
                    android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_medium"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_add"
                    android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
                    android:tint="@color/primary"
                    android:contentDescription="添加文件" />

                <ImageButton
                    android:id="@+id/btn_delete_file"
                    android:layout_width="@dimen/icon_medium"
                    android:layout_height="@dimen/icon_medium"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_delete"
                    android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
                    android:tint="@color/error"
                    android:contentDescription="删除文件" />

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 文件树列表 -->
            <ScrollView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scrollbars="vertical">

                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/file_tree_container"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:padding="@dimen/spacing_sm" />

            </ScrollView>

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 分割线 -->
        <View
            android:id="@+id/divider"
            android:layout_width="1dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="@color/divider" />

        <!-- 右侧代码编辑区 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/code_editor_container"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="70"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="@color/surface">

            <!-- 当前文件信息栏 - 移除菜单按钮 -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="horizontal"
                android:padding="@dimen/spacing_md"
                android:background="@color/surface_variant"
                android:gravity="center_vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:text="当前文件："
                    style="@style/TextBody" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tv_current_file"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="2"
                    android:text="未选择"
                    style="@style/TextBody"
                    android:textColor="@color/primary"
                    android:singleLine="true"
                    android:ellipsize="middle" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tv_file_status"
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="未修改"
                    style="@style/TextCaption"
                    android:textColor="@color/text_hint" />

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- 代码编辑区 -->
            <ScrollView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scrollbars="vertical"
                android:background="@color/surface">

                <EditText
                    android:id="@+id/et_code"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:gravity="top"
                    android:inputType="textMultiLine"
                    android:fontFamily="monospace"
                    android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption"
                    android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                    android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"
                    android:lineSpacingExtra="@dimen/spacing_xxs"
                    android:minHeight="400dp" />

            </ScrollView>

        </LinearLayout>

    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- 底部按钮 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="@dimen/spacing_lg"
        android:gravity="center">

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btn_save"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_medium"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="保存"
            style="@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.Button"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/spacing_md" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btn_cancel"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_medium"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="关闭"
            style="@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Outlined"
            android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/spacing_md" />

    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
    <!-- 基础主题 -->
    <style name="Theme.UIN.Tool" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.NoActionBar">
        <item name="android:statusBarColor">@android:color/transparent</item>
        <item name="android:windowLightStatusBar" tools:targetApi="m">true</item>
        <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@android:color/transparent</item>
        <item name="android:windowLightNavigationBar" tools:targetApi="o_mr1">true</item>
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/background</item>
        <item name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</item>
        <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@color/primary_dark</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent</item>
        <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">@color/primary_light</item>
        <item name="android:fontFamily">sans-serif</item>
        <item name="android:windowAnimationStyle">@style/Animation.UIN.Tool</item>
        <item name="materialCardViewStyle">@style/Widget.UIN.Tool.CardView</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 动画样式 -->
    <style name="Animation.UIN.Tool" parent="@android:style/Animation.Activity">
        <item name="android:activityOpenEnterAnimation">@anim/slide_in_right</item>
        <item name="android:activityOpenExitAnimation">@anim/slide_out_left</item>
        <item name="android:activityCloseEnterAnimation">@anim/slide_in_left</item>
        <item name="android:activityCloseExitAnimation">@anim/slide_out_right</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- CardView 样式 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.CardView" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.CardView">
        <item name="cardCornerRadius">12dp</item>
        <item name="cardElevation">2dp</item>
        <item name="cardBackgroundColor">@color/surface_card</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 主要按钮样式 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button">
        <item name="android:textColor">@android:color/white</item>
        <item name="backgroundTint">@color/primary</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">8dp</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingStart">16dp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingEnd">16dp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">36dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 轮廓按钮 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Outlined" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton">
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary</item>
        <item name="strokeColor">@color/primary</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">8dp</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingStart">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingEnd">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">36dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 文本按钮 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Text" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton">
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">8dp</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">36dp</item>
        <item name="android:minWidth">0dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 错误按钮 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Error" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button">
        <item name="android:textColor">@android:color/white</item>
        <item name="backgroundTint">@color/error</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">8dp</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingStart">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingEnd">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">36dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 成功按钮 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Success" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button">
        <item name="android:textColor">@android:color/white</item>
        <item name="backgroundTint">@color/success</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">8dp</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingStart">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:paddingEnd">12dp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">36dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 扁平按钮（用于网格按钮） -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.Button.Flat" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button">
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
        <item name="android:background">@drawable/bg_button_flat</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">0dp</item>
        <item name="android:minWidth">0dp</item>
        <item name="android:elevation">0dp</item>
        <item name="android:stateListAnimator">@null</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">11sp</item>
        <item name="cornerRadius">0dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- EditText 样式 -->
    <style name="Widget.UIN.Tool.EditText" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputEditText.OutlinedBox">
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
        <item name="android:textColorHint">@color/text_hint</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:minHeight">40dp</item>
    </style>
    
    <!-- 文本样式 -->
    <style name="TextTitle">
        <item name="android:textSize">16sp</item>
        <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
    </style>
    
    <style name="TextSubtitle">
        <item name="android:textSize">14sp</item>
        <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
    </style>
    
    <style name="TextBody">
        <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_secondary</item>
    </style>
    
    <style name="TextCaption">
        <item name="android:textSize">11sp</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_hint</item>
    </style>
    
    <style name="TextHeadline">
        <item name="android:textSize">18sp</item>
        <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
    </style>
    
    <style name="TextDisplayLarge">
        <item name="android:textSize">22sp</item>
        <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item>
    </style>
</resources>

<resources>

    <!-- 统一卡片内边距 -->
